name: Chocolate Truffle Heaven
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop or grate dark chocolate into small pieces. Melt chocolate and cream in a double boiler. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature. Fold in 3 ounces of white chocolate that has been chopped into chunks and the macadamia nuts. Transfer to a covered bowl and place in refrigerator overnight.
2. Form chocolate into balls. Place on waxed paper and again refrigerate overnight. Allow to set uncovered in refrigerator at least 2 hours before loosely covering with wax paper.
3. Melt white chocolate in a double boiler. Dip truffles and place on waxed paper lined baking sheets. Decorate with chocolate sprinkles. The number of truffles you make will depend on the size desired.
